title: Kingdom's tears
description: A Minecraft mod that brings aspects and structures from the Nintendo title, The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom.
body:
I'm new to the modding scene, and I'm a one-person team (who also has a life) so progress won't exactly be very fast. In my time spent in the most modern era of Hyrule, I've become super attached to the world and narrative that Nintendo created in their 2023 title; The Legend of Zelda: Tears of The Kingdom. All the assets are being made on my own. I have some experience in graphic design, and I'm guessing things will get better the longer I work on this project. Initially I planned to keep this mod to myself and as a secret until it's totally done, but I want to have archives of my progress, and to share my creation with the world :)

This mod aims to bring parts of ToTK into the Minecraft world. I have big plans that will be shared as I go along the journey, but I'm keeping some of it under wraps between updates, so I can hopefully build up hype over time!
